close_reason: Design decision: metadata treated like any other shard, no special routing needed
description: Ensure the metadata shard (shard 0, FF-prefixed keys) is always routed to ALL logs, not just a subset. This enables any log to bootstrap the cluster during recovery (like FDB's TxnStateStore pattern). Prerequisite: shard tagging in wire format (bedrock-9bj). Implementation: special-case shard 0 in log assignment to include all log IDs. Files: finalization.ex (find_logs_for_tags), log assignment logic.
title: Route metadata mutations to all logs
